title: Oliver Hannaoui
text:
Greetings, I am a first-year Statistics PhD student at Carnegie Mellon University.
Previously, I spent a year in Paris and completed an M1 Applied Mathematics and Statistics program at the Polytechnic Institute of Paris. During my time in Paris, I also completed an AI engineering internship at Ennov.
Prior to that, I spent two formative years in New York City as a Senior Research Analyst in the Financial Intermediation group at the Federal Reserve Bank of New York after graduating with bachelor’s degrees in Economics and Statistics from the University of California, Davis.
